summary: Comprehensive testing of Event Registration System. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Registration flow works perfectly but discovered critical bug - 'Register Now' button not rendering on Events page despite API returning registration_enabled=true.

ui_bugs.issue: Register Now button not rendering for events with registration_enabled=true. API returns correct data but the Link component with data-testid='event-register-btn' does not appear in the DOM.
ui_bugs.evidence: API returns registration_enabled=True for event '435435f4-774f-4a0f-95e1-1e423493c196' but DOM does not contain 'Register Now' text. Direct navigation to /events/{id}/register works fine.

action_items: Fix EventsPage.jsx line 99-105 - The condition {event.registration_enabled && event.status !== 'completed'} evaluates to true but the Link component does not render. May be a React rendering issue or conditional rendering bug.
Verify the events state contains registration_enabled field after API fetch
critical_code_review_comments: EventsPage.jsx: The conditional rendering of Register Now button (line 99) appears correct but does not execute. Debug by adding console.log inside the map function to verify event.registration_enabled value.

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Registration page flow works, Events page Register button not rendering

seed_data_creation: Test registrations created via backend tests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully working (all 20 tests pass). Frontend EventRegistrationPage multi-step flow (4 steps) works perfectly when navigated directly via URL. Critical bug: EventsPage 'Register Now' button not rendering despite API returning registration_enabled=true. Admin Events page with fee tiers, accommodation config, and registrations modal all work.

backend_apis.POST /api/admin/events: Create event with fee_tiers, accommodation, registration_enabled - PASSED
backend_apis.GET /api/public/events/{event_id}/regist: Returns fee tiers, accommodation config, membership_fees - PASSED
backend_apis.GET /api/public/members/lookup?phone=xxx: Member lookup returns member data or found:false - PASSED
backend_apis.POST /api/public/events/{event_id}/regis: Registers with fee breakdown, creates member app if wants_membership - PASSED

frontend_events_page.register_now_button: FAILED - Button does not render despite registration_enabled=true

frontend_registration_page.step1_member_selection: PASSED - Member/Non-member cards with phone lookup
frontend_registration_page.step2_participant_details: PASSED - Form with optional membership checkbox
frontend_registration_page.step4_review_submit: PASSED - Fee breakdown and Confirm Registration button

admin_events_page.event_list: PASSED - Shows events with REG. OPEN badge
admin_events_page.registrations_button: PASSED - Opens modal with registrations table
admin_events_page.add_event_modal: PASSED - Fee tier management with Academic/Entrepreneur/Corporate/Non-Member fees
admin_events_page.accommodation_config: PASSED - Enable accommodation, self option, free categories, hotels

frontend_tests: EventsPage Register Now button - FAILED (not rendering)
Admin Add Event modal with fee tiers - PASSED

rca_of_issue.issue: Register Now button not rendering on EventsPage
investigation: API returns registration_enabled=True for test event
DOM check confirms 'Register Now' text not in page
Event cards render correctly with other content
Code at line 99 appears correct: {event.registration_enabled && event.status !== 'completed'}
possible_causes: React state not properly updating with registration_enabled field
Hot reload may have cached old code
Potential issue with how events state preserves registration_enabled from API response
rca_of_issue.recommended_fix: Add console.log before the conditional to verify event.registration_enabled value during render. Consider force restart of frontend if hot reload issue suspected.
